svg.text: SERENITY-CLASS TILTROTOR — PHASED BUILD PLAN (REV O)
© 2026 Steve Griffing PE(CSE) CISSP-ISSEP CPP · CC BY 4.0
10 phases (0-9) · first flight at Phase 6 (~$640) · full 8-node at Phase 7 (~$1,120) · total ~$1,900 · install ALL conduits/voids/mounts in Phase 1 before foam pour
PHASE 0
PRINT ALL PARTS + CUT CF
• Dry filament 6h @ 65°C · install hardened steel nozzle
• Print ALL hull sections (PETG 8% gyroid 0.20mm)
• Print 2× nacelle_pod_50mm_tandem (CF-PETG, 40% gyroid, 4 walls)
• Print nozzle iris parts, s_wing_nacelle_pylon_revo.scad, cargo gondola, ToF mounts
• Print access-panel frames ×6 + lids ×6 (100% infill 2mm wall)
• Print TPU skids, cargo cradle, clamshell door halves
• Print M=1.0 sector/bevel/pinion/crown gear set at 0.12mm layer height
• Cut CF keel 620mm · spars 2×380mm · ring frames · 4mm CF pivot rods
• Dry-fit: keel threads all hull sections · pod ID calipered vs EDF OD
TEST: dry-fit all panels · pod OD vs EDF · nozzle gear mesh
Cost: ~$65 (filament + CF + gears) | Cumulative: ~$65
PHASE 1
STRUCTURE + ALL PROVISIONS
• Bond access-panel frames A–F into hull with 5-min epoxy
• Install M2.5 nylon standoffs in all 4 node bays (A, B, D, E)
• Bond 12× ToF sensor PETG flush-mounts into hull cutouts
• Install M3 cargo hard-point threaded inserts (×4) belly
• Install SMA bulkheads: belly (SiK 915MHz) + dorsal (RCRS)
• Install GPS patch recess at mid-fuselage dorsal sta 140mm
• Feed 8× PTFE conduits + pull strings nose-to-tail (label both ends)
• Insert waxed EPS void formers A–E · epoxy hull to keel · cure 12h
• FOAM POUR X-30 (≤60mL batches per panel, 24h cure) · remove formers · fit panels
⚠ POINT OF NO RETURN — verify ALL provisions before foam pour
Cost: ~$80 (foam, epoxy, conduits, hardware) | Cumul: ~$145
PHASE 2
NACELLE MECH + BUDGET EDFs
• Press 4× MF104ZZ flanged bearings into pivot housing bores (2 per nacelle)
• Thread 4mm CF pivot rod; nacelle CG pivot at Z=83mm from intake
• Install 2× DS3218MG tilt servos (≥25kg·cm @ 6V); hard stops -5°/140°
• Install 4× 50mm 6S EDFs (2 per nacelle tandem); verify CW/CCW rotation
• Install 1× 120mm 6S EDF in plenum outlet bell at sta ~430mm
• Solder WS2812C nav LEDs: PORT=RED · STBD=GREEN · epoxy seal
• Assemble gear nozzle trains ×2 nacelle (passive) + 1× rear (SG90 servo)
• Nozzle sweep: open=42mm exit · closed=36mm exit; verify with calipers
• Verify blade clearance at 0°, 90°, 115° nacelle angles
TEST: sweep ×10 each · nozzle 42/36mm · LED polarity · 140° hard stop
Cost: ~$145 (budget EDFs + XFLY + servos) | Cumul: ~$290
PHASE 3
MINIMUM VIABLE FLYER
• 4× BLHeli32 40A ESC (50mm EDFs) + 1× BLHeli32 80A (120mm rear) · Dual BEC PDB
• Nodes FC1+CN1+FC2+CN2: 4× PocketBeagle2 + CAPE-A-1 + CAPE-B-1
• MIL-STD-1553B PRU firmware on all 4 AM6254 PRU0 cores
• SiK 915MHz belly port + LoRa RFM95W belly stbd + 49MHz RCRS-49 top wire
• u-blox M10Q GPS at dorsal sta 140mm · WS2812C-2020 nav LEDs · 6S 4000mAh
• SLB9670 TPM 2.0 provision on all 4 nodes · write-blocker μSD enable
• Boot PocketBeagle2 AM6254 Debian 12 · install mavlink-router · configure
• CG at 203mm (knife-edge) · ESC calibration · servo ±5° · radio HDOP check
• FAA reg N-number on airframe · ABCD pre-flight checklist
★ FIRST FLIGHT: tethered hover → free hover → transition ≥26ft AGL
Cost: ~$380 (Node 1 + ESCs + power + radios) | Cumul: ~$670
PHASE 4
NODE 4: ACTUATOR REDUNDANCY
• PocketBeagle2 + CAPE-A-1 + CAPE-B-1 in bay E
• Each CAPE-A-1 PRU0 = dedicated real-time flight control
• Provision TPM + write-blocker on FC3+CN3+FC4+CN4 independently
• FC4 monitors FC1 heartbeat via CAN FD; assumes control <100ms on N1 timeout
• FC4 is CAN FD ring endpoint; 120Ω terminator at FC4
• Pull all 8 bus conduits to each node bay
• FC4 cross-checks IMU against FC1 (agree ±2°/s all axes) (agree ±2°/s on all axes)
• Provision all 4 new nodes independently (unique key material each)
TEST: kill FC1 → FC2 holds hover within 100ms · IMU cross-check · IMU cross-check
Cost: ~$180 (4× PB2-I + capes, nodes FC3+CN3+FC4+CN4) | Cumul: ~$756
PHASE 5
NODES 2 & 3 + FULL OA
• Full 8-node ring active · all VL53L5CX arrays commissioned
• OA Array A (FC3 primary): S1A-S6A omnidirectional
• OA Array B (FC2 primary): S1B-S6B spatially offset from Array A
• 12 sensors total · dual I2C buses · TCA9548A mux · XSHUT GPIO
• Full 4-bus redundancy: CAN FD + RS-485 + MIL-STD-1553B + ETH RSTP
• Full 4-node CAN FD ring · RS-485 multidrop · 1553 BC+RTs · ETH star
• Autonomous 3-waypoint mission · GPS-guided · RTL on link loss
• OA halt at 1.0m · dual-array fusion 15Hz · single node OA coverage OK
TEST: all 12 ToF valid · wall halt 1.0m · 3-wpt autonomous mission
Cost: ~$177 (2× CM3+ + CM3-CARRIER + 12× ToF) | Cumul: ~$933
PHASE 6
CARGO SYSTEM
• Epoxy cargo gondola shell into belly void at M3 hard points
• Gondola: 101.6×76.2×76.2mm interior · 18mm belly protrusion
• Install clamshell door halves on 3mm CF hinge pins
• N20 300:1 winch motor + drum · 1.5m Dyneema SK75 0.5mm
• DRV8833 H-bridge driver · SG90 door servo · SG90 release servo
• Auto-latch cradle on Dyneema: no manual loading in flight
• Node 3 GPIO → cargo commands · seal gondola-hull joint
TEST: 250g load ×5 · winch deploy/retract · T/W ≥2.60 with cargo
Cost: ~$30 (winch + servos + Dyneema) | Cumul: ~$963
PHASE 7
FULL 8-NODE ARCHITECTURE
• All 8 nodes commissioned; full ring redundancy active
• Verify CAN FD RSTP ring · RS-485 multidrop · 1553 BC+RT · ETH star
• Full OA: dual-array fusion 15Hz · halt at 1.0m · RTL on link loss
• Autonomous 3-waypoint mission · GPS-guided · verify CG 203mm ±5mm
• Incremental payload test: 100g → 200g → 250g max
• ABCD pre-flight checklist · FAA N-number on airframe
• Full flight envelope: hover · transition · cruise 40kts · RTL
• Wing lift verification: S1223 at 3° → L≥6.3N (18% AUW)
★ FULL 8-NODE: all systems redundant · first cargo mission
Cost: ~$180 (nodes FC3+CN3+FC4+CN4) | Cumul: ~$1,553
PHASE 8
FINISHING + FAA + DOCS
• Replace N00000 placeholder with issued FAA Part 48 N-number
• Print waterslide decal sheet (seal with clear coat after printing)
• Apply decals per build_guide_19_decal_placement.svg:
A: SERENITY lettering · B: FAA reg (REQUIRED) · C: universe markings
D: safety labels (sUAS data plate, LiPo, limits) · E: weathering
• Final airworthiness inspection: all fasteners · CG · antenna secure
• Archive firmware checksums, build log, test records
• FAA compliance: N-number visible · Part 107 cert current · <55 lb AUW
ABCD: Airframe · Battery · Comms · Docs — all green before each flight
Cost: ~$20 (decal paper + printing) | TOTAL: ~$1,573
First flight at Phase 6: ~$640 total · Full 8-node: ~$1,120 · Total ~$1,900 | All conduits/voids installed Phase 1 — no structural rework after foam pour
Hull: Peter Farell CC BY 4.0 · Nozzle: BamJr CC BY 4.0 · Visual inspiration: Firefly/Serenity © Joss Whedon/Mutant Enemy/Universal — Fan engineering work
